dialogos.texto_en: Today was seriously tiring...\nEverything's just way too unexpected.
(Even here, I have things I must do.)
(*sigh*\n When it comes down to it,\n I didn't really achieve anything today.)
(...Honestly, I haven't really obtained any\n useful hints to see through their disguises\n during this game.)
(And when all five of them are together,\n it attracts attention and leads to a commotion.)
(This situation is the worst...)
(There's only one day left now. I need to find a hint\n to see through their disguises quickly,\n or it'll be too late.)
We made it pretty far at the aquarium, though.\nIf only there weren't so many gawkers there...
There's no way they're exactly the same.\nTheir body shape should at least be different, right?
...Body shape, huh?
(Yotsuba exercises regularly,\n so I might be able to tell\n by the way her muscles are toned.)
(Ichika is an actress.\n She probably pays attention to maintaining her figure,\n so she might be a bit different from the other four.)
(Ah!\n Come to think of it, Miku mentioned\n that you can distinguish them by their moles!)
(Ah, that's no good!\n I have no idea who has what mole!)
(But, if I can skillfully investigate,\n it might become a means\n to see through their disguises, right?)
...Tomorrow is the beach. If they're in swimsuits,\n it'll be easier to observe their body types and moles,\n so it might be worth taking that gamble...
There's no other choice, is there?\nI can't think of anything else.
(It's out of my hands.\n Right now, I have to rely on that method%p-2;――%p;)
(No, is that really okay?\n Is that the right way to do it?!)
...No, this won't do!
(...Come to think of it,\n I once saw through Miku's disguise\n at their Grandpa's hot spring inn.)
No, it's really impossible, isn't it?\nI'm being ridiculous.
(I'm so desperate\n that I'm relying on the words of onlookers...)
(But, even if I have no plan,\n I feel like this is wrong.)
Still, there has to be something else...
(...Come to think of it,\n I once saw through Miku's disguise\n at their Grandpa's hot spring inn.)
...Is that really okay?
(Even though I just said it,\n I have a feeling something is off.)
(Indeed, I might be able to distinguish them\n by their body types...but that's not\n the type of connection we've made.)
That's right. This method is definitely wrong.
(...Come to think of it,\n I once saw through Miku's disguise\n at their Grandpa's hot spring inn.)
(At that time, I also tried to identify who it was\n based on the injury on her thigh, but%p-2;――%p;)
(In the end, it didn't work out well.)
(Why did I know that it was Miku?)
A way to tell them apart...
Surely you can do it too.\nIf you have love!
Our mother used to say that.\nIf you have love, you can naturally tell them apart.
(That's it...)
Love.
With love, you can tell them apart.
(Once more, I need to remember their grandfather's words!\n Uesugi Futaro!)
After a long time...\nOne comes to know their gestures, voices, and habits.
That can be called love.
It cannot be done overnight.\nFor what reason do you want\nto tell my granddaughters apart?
What do you want to do once you can tell them apart?
What I want to do it...
Do you have the determination\nto face my granddaughters?
What have I been doing?
(What I need to do\n isn't just to expose their disguises.)
(I've been manipulated by them so much\n that my purpose and means have been reversed,\n without me noticing.)
(And because I was too conscious\n of figuring them out,\n I confused myself. I'm really an idiot!)
...Only one day remains. Tomorrow.
(Yet, there's no need to rush anymore.)
(I've already made up my mind.)
